name: [fornecer: nome da marca (brand_config.identity.BRAND_NAME)] -- Research Universe (Multi-Source Brain)
description: Run ONE seed (a product, brand, CNPJ, company, keyword, or store:id) through the full research brain -- firmographics (CNPJ/IBGE), social signal (app store / Reddit / YouTube), reputation (Reclame Aqui), PT sentiment, SEO keywords, and multi-perspective questions -- as ONE unified multi-source report with honest per-lane status (ok / blocked / skipped) and provenance.

skills.name: Research Universe (Multi-Source Brain)
skills.description: Run ONE seed (a product, brand, CNPJ, company, keyword, or store:id) through the full research brain -- firmographics (CNPJ/IBGE), social signal (app store / Reddit / YouTube), reputation (Reclame Aqui), PT sentiment, SEO keywords, and multi-perspective questions -- as ONE unified multi-source report with honest per-lane status (ok / blocked / skipped) and provenance.
examples: Pesquise <produto/marca/CNPJ> -- firmografia, social, reputacao, SEO e perguntas

_meta.note: A2A AgentCard scoped to ONE CEXAI capability. supportedInterfaces is empty until this agent is deployed behind a URL endpoint.
